title: xyris stenophylla
intro: Xyris stenophylla, also known as the Yellow-eyed Grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Xyridaceae. It is native to the subtropical and tropical regions of Australia and Southeast Asia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Xyris stenophylla include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, headache, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Xyris stenophylla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
